character_identity_card: GENGHIS KHAN IDENTITY (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): adult Mongol chieftain, sturdy build. Face: perfectly circular, 100% pure white (#FFFFFF), flat, no shading, no skin tone. Features: 2 small black dot eyes with thick pointed eyebrow strokes above (sharper and more intense than other characters), 1 short horizontal black mouth line. NO nose. NO cheeks. Hair: JET BLACK, LONG, straight, falling past the shoulders, parted loosely from the center of the head (NOT braided, NOT tied). Beard: thick black full beard and mustache drawn as a black shape attached to the lower face (distinctive mark of Genghis). Body: dark earth-brown Mongol deel coat with FUR-TRIMMED collar and shoulders, crossed wrap tied by a leather cord sash at the waist, rust-red under-tunic visible at the neck. Hands: pure white MITTEN shapes, no finger detail visible. May hold a wooden bowl, spoon, curved bow, saber, or horsewhip depending on scene. Pose should vary per scene but IDENTITY IS IMMUTABLE across every frame.
character_block: The central subject is Genghis Khan (see identity card above — DO NOT deviate). ABSOLUTE RULE FOR OTHER HUMANS IN THE SCENE: EVERY other human character — Mongol generals, warriors, elders, shamans, enemies, nomads, children, women, captives, EVERYONE — MUST share Genghis' face style exactly: pure WHITE ROUND FEATURELESS FACE with only tiny black dot eyes, thin eyebrow strokes, and minimal straight mouth line. NO realistic human faces, NO skin tones, NO noses, NO cheeks, NO wrinkles, NO visible teeth. Hands always pure white mitten shapes. Genghis stands OUT by: long unbraided black hair past shoulders + full thick black beard + fur-trimmed brown deel. Secondary characters differ from each other AND from Genghis by: shorter or differently-shaped black hair (topknot, short crop, small braids), different beard shapes (goatee, moustache only, clean-shaven), and clothing (plainer un-furred Mongol deels in ochre or dusty red or dark green, leather armor, Chinese silk robes for defeated kings, fur caps). The WHITE ROUND FACE is non-negotiable on every humanoid in the frame.
global_style_card: STYLE (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): children's picture book / storytime YouTube animation, matching the reference image vibe. Pure 2D cel-shading — NO 3D render, NO photorealism, NO anime. Outlines: uniform, bold black, ~3-5px thickness everywhere (characters, props, architecture, animals, textiles). Colors: flat fills with at most 2-3 tonal shades per object (no smooth gradients on faces or bodies). Palette dominant: dark earth brown, warm leather tan, rust-red under-tunic, ochre yurt interior, deep chocolate shadows, muted steppe green, dusty grey sky, warm amber oil-lamp glow. Lighting: atmospheric and restrained — warm interiors lit by oil lamps, cold flat light on the steppe exterior, dramatic red sunsets, NO harsh rim light on faces. Textiles (yurt rugs, deels, banners) carry subtle Mongol/Asian pattern motifs. Aspect ratio: 16:9 cinematic. Composition: environment fills the frame, humans grouped with Genghis often centered among followers.
style_block: clean 2D cel-shading storytime YouTube animation style, bold thick black outlines, flat simple colors, cold wide steppe lighting by day and warm campfire glow by night, Mongolian medieval aesthetic, cinematic composition, 16:9
negative_prompt: realistic human faces, human skin tones on faces, realistic facial features, detailed cheeks, wrinkled realistic faces, detailed eyes, detailed noses, visible teeth, detailed skin texture, 3D rendering, photorealistic, detailed fingers, gradient shading on skin, heavy shadows on face, anime style, text, watermark, characters with normal human faces, mix of art styles, some characters realistic some cartoon, inconsistent character appearance, Genghis with different deel color, Genghis with short hair, European medieval setting, knights in plate armor
